title: Pizza Party
description: PKA "Wintooo's Pizzas" - Adds many variants of pizzas to the game.
body:
**What does this mod do?**

Adds a great variety of pizzas to the game; the pizzas functionally work a lot like cakes but give slices instead of consuming the cake. Each topping added to pizzas has a different effect attached to it and an extra saturation + hunger modifier.
The mod also adds party items such as the party hat and party horn for fun!

Original version: [https://modrinth.com/mod/wintooos-pizzas](https://modrinth.com/mod/wintooos-pizzas)


**What features are included?**

Pizzas:
- Eight normal variants with different toppings
- Golden Pizza and Enchanted Pizza Slices
- End and Nether pizza (give levitation and fire resistance respectively)

Other features:
- Pizza Cutter weapon (low damage, low durability, high speed)
- Party Hat and Party Horn (yippee!!)
- Pineapples/pineapple plants!

**Common questions**
- How do I get pineapple?
  - Farmers can trade pineapple crowns to grow pineapple!
- How do I get the helium pump?
  - Toolsmiths can trade helium pumps!
